---
title: "Publications"
body-classes: page-title
page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: publications-list
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    sort:
      - "pub-status asc"
      - "date desc"
    template: templates/publication-card.ejs.md
    fields: [title, pub-authors, pub-year, venue, pub-status, pub-type, categories, pdf, data, code, doi, citation-count, altmetric-count]
    filter-ui: false
    exclude:
      draft: true
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.header-text}
::: {.header-title}
PUBLICATIONS
:::

::: {.header-subtitle}
Peer-reviewed articles, chapters, and related scholarly work from the CALM Lab.
:::
:::
:::

<div class="pub-filter-bar">
  <button class="pill pill-filter active" data-filter="all">All</button>
  <button class="pill pill-filter" data-filter="Journal Article">Journal Articles</button>
  <button class="pill pill-filter" data-filter="Book Chapter">Book Chapters</button>
  <button class="pill pill-filter" data-filter="Popular Writing">Popular Writing</button>
</div>

::: {#publications-list}
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const buttons = document.querySelectorAll(".pub-filter-bar .pill-filter");

  function updatePublicationFilter(filter) {
    const list = document.querySelector(".publications-list");
    if (!list) return;

    const children = Array.from(list.children);

    children.forEach((el) => {
      if (el.classList.contains("publication-entry")) {
        const pubType = el.dataset.pubType || "";
        const show = filter === "all" || pubType === filter;
        el.style.display = show ? "" : "none";
      }
    });

    const yearGroups = list.querySelectorAll(".publication-year-group");

    yearGroups.forEach((group) => {
      let next = group.nextElementSibling;
      let hasVisibleEntries = false;

      while (next && !next.classList.contains("publication-year-group")) {
        if (
          next.classList.contains("publication-entry") &&
          next.style.display !== "none"
        ) {
          hasVisibleEntries = true;
          break;
        }
        next = next.nextElementSibling;
      }

      group.style.display = hasVisibleEntries ? "" : "none";
    });
  }

  buttons.forEach((button) => {
    button.addEventListener("click", function () {
      const filter = this.dataset.filter;

      buttons.forEach((btn) => btn.classList.remove("active"));
      this.classList.add("active");

      updatePublicationFilter(filter);
    });
  });

  updatePublicationFilter("all");
});
</script>
